reviewTrigger: worker, host, tool, Bun, Effect, repository skill, public boundary, or release-graph change

journeys.oracle: The retained test detail names the executed @taxkit/calculators workspace task.
journeys.recovery: packages/calculators/README.md and the calculator package owner
journeys.nonClaim: Local calculator proof does not establish publication, deployment, provider state, or public availability.

journeys.command: bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk check-packed-artifact && bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk validate:downstream
journeys.oracle: The isolated consumer installs the generated dist-only tarball rather than workspace source.
journeys.nonClaim: The transient local tarball establishes no registry publication or external availability.

journeys.oracle: The smoke client Schema-decodes real local health, metadata, calculation, schema-error, and OpenAPI responses.
journeys.nonClaim: The ephemeral local API establishes no deployed API, provider, or public availability state.

journeys.command: bun run docs:validate && bun run --filter=docs test:browser
journeys.oracle: The browser harness observes local render, navigation, server-function, recoverable-error, and console states.
journeys.nonClaim: Local docs-runtime proof establishes no public-site, deployed SSR, hydration, or availability state.

journeys.oracle: The canonical nine-check graph runs in report-only CI mode without candidate or attempt mutation.
journeys.nonClaim: A green local CI graph is not versioning, a commit, push, tag, release, registry publication, deployment, provider state, or public availability.

seededContradictions.invariant: exercise the named consumer boundary and oracle

seededContradictions.reject: latest, tmp, candidate, failed, superseded, or hash-mismatched proof as accepted
procedure copied into a skill or README
unchecked ingress, instanceof policy, nested runtime, or helper/common/utils sprawl
seededContradictions.invariant: Schema-decoded typed, flat sequential Effect boundaries

independentGrade.resultPath: outside the worker-visible TaxKit repository candidate
independentGrade.nonClaim: Worker-local scenario preparation is not independent acceptance.
